items.description: Development and maintenance of high-traffic web applications with React and TypeScript. Implementation of design systems and performance improvements that reduced load time by 40%.

Design and implementation of component system with Storybook
Mentoring junior developers on the team

achievements: Built the reports module with PDF generation
Reduced bundle size by 35% through code splitting

achievements: WCAG 2.1 accessibility improvements on key projects
